creator: beyert@cs.ucr.edu
text:
- Update port to version 0.7.1.

- It is necessary to process the PR for port for audio/libmp3splt
(http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=166899) first.  It will not compile
using earlier versions of audio/libmp3splt.

- Get rid of audacious support, because it requires gtk3.

- Implement NOPORTDOCS support.

- Get rid of unnecessary post-patch target.

- Updated pkg-plist generated using genplist, with a few small modifications.

- Simplify NLS option.

Fix: Apply the patch and build
How-To-Repeat: apply the patch and build
